input.raw_idea: App-store style description for a local services marketplace that helps neighborhood event planners find vetted setup crews, compare availability, book time slots, pay through escrow, and leave reviews. The copy also says teams get a lightweight workflow dashboard and AI scheduling reminders, but the core loop is supply onboarding, demand acquisition, listings, bookings, payments, and repeat transactions.
input.goal: Evaluate liquidity, cold start, supply and demand acquisition, transaction frequency, take rate, trust/safety, and disintermediation risk.
input.context: SaaS workflow wording is present, but the realistic app description should remain a marketplace case.

contains.name: real marketplace structure dominates SaaS wording

not_contains.name: no SaaS enterprise creator medical drift

labels.name: unsupported claims cannot be high confidence
